roa.docketEntryComment: ACCOUNT SETUP IN CUBS,REFER TO CCU,DO NOT TAKE PAYMENT

/CAL: DA MTR TRLG #2360324 AND SPR ELIG RPT/SPRGR/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF SPR DEFENDANT MUST PARTICIPATE IN SUBSTANCE ABUSETREATMENT SERVICES, DEFENDANT WILL ATTEND GROUPS AT THE CACMC AND REPORT 5 TIMES A WEEK IN PERSON TO SPR/X: THE HEARING DATE OF 4-4-08 IS CONFIRMED/DOP/

/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ2D/CTS 2/WS/SA2 74 TURK STREET, SAN FRANCISO/X:STAY AWAY ORDER SERVED AT TIME OF ARRAIGNMENT,/SECFEE/VF1/X:DEFENDANT ORDERED TO PROCEED TO ROOM 101 IMMEDIATELY,/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/
/AMENDCOM ADD COUNT 2, 653F(D)PC, A MISDEMEANOR/WIA/IRR/TEXT DEFT ADV & PRS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/CON:JAMES SENAL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/OR/987,2/SAORD/SA2:150 YRDS FROM 74 TURK STREET/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CTORD:PROBATION IN #2344361 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL IN VIEW OF SENTENCE IN #2360324/
/CAL:PRE HRG CONF/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:NO APPEARANCE OF COUNSEL L, DUBIN, PRELIM HRG DATE OF 02-13-08 IS CONFIRMED/
